steps.assistant_text: Short-int reader template (mirrors func_00000008 int reader). Uses short buf[4] (8-byte array) to place buf at sp+0x18 — short buf[2] puts it at sp+0x1C (4 bytes too high, per feedback_ido_buf_array_alignment).

metadata.verification: Verified with objdiff (100.0%) and project build.
